shell.verifyEmailBanner: Confirm your email address to unlock all features.

auth.lede: Create, plan, and publish SEO content in one place — with AI assistance, built-in analytics, and integrations. Multi-tenant, for your whole team.
auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to the Shoot SEO dashboard
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.forgotSubtitle: We'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.checkInboxDescription: If the account exists, we've sent a message with a password reset link.
auth.resetPageTitle: Set a new password — Shoot SEO
auth.resetSubtitle: Enter a new password for your account.
auth.openEmailLink: Open the link from the email to reset your password.
auth.emailVerifiedDescription: Your email address has been confirmed.
auth.sentMessageSuffix: Click the link in the message to activate your account.
auth.invitationInvalidDescription: This invitation has expired or doesn't exist.

dashboard.description: An overview of your content workspace — create, plan, and publish in one place.
dashboard.emptyDescription: Start with your first post — with AI assistance you'll write it in minutes.

posts.listDescription: Create, plan, and publish content in the “{workspace}” workspace.
posts.emptyDescription: You don't have any posts yet. Start with your first one — with AI assistance you'll write it in minutes.
posts.deleteModalDescription: Are you sure you want to delete “{title}”? This action cannot be undone.
posts.notFoundDescription: The post doesn't exist or doesn't belong to the current workspace.

editor.basicsDescription: Title, URL, and a short excerpt for the post.
editor.contentDescription: The post's main content, with formatting and images.
editor.seoDescription: Metadata for search engines and social media.
editor.distributionHint: Save the post to choose distribution channels.
editor.mainImageDescription: Shown on the post list and in the header.
editor.aiRateLimitError: AI usage limit for this period has been reached.

calendar.title: Publishing calendar
calendar.description: Plan and review the publishing schedule for the “{workspace}” workspace.
calendar.selectDayHint: Click a day in the calendar to see scheduled and published posts.

media.selectImageHint: from the library or upload a new one
media.libraryDescription: Choose an existing file or upload a new one.
media.empty: No media yet. Upload your first file.
media.description: Files and images for the “{workspace}” workspace — ready to use in posts.
media.emptyDescription: Upload your first file to use it in posts.

distribution.title: Distribution
distribution.description: Choose the social channels this post will be published to.

analytics.description: Traffic and engagement for content published in this workspace.
analytics.postDescription: Traffic and engagement for this post over the selected period.
analytics.emptyDescription: Once your published content starts getting traffic, you'll see views, unique visitors, and engagement time here.
analytics.chartAriaLabel: Daily chart of views and unique visitors
analytics.postEmptyDescription: This post hasn't collected any traffic in the selected period yet.

autonomous.title: Autonomous content
autonomous.description: Crawl a client's site, build a brief, and let AI propose drafts on a schedule.

gate.toastTitle: Feature not available on this plan
gate.alertTitle: This feature requires a higher plan
gate.alertDescription: Autonomous content generation is available on the Pro and Business plans.

autonomous.sitesEmptyDescription: Add a client's site URL to build a brief and start autonomous generation.
autonomous.plansEmptyDescription: Create a plan for a ready site so AI can start proposing drafts.
autonomous.proposalsEmptyDescription: Once a plan runs, generated drafts will appear here for review.

members.description: People with access to the “{workspace}” workspace and their roles.
members.inviteModalDescription: Send an email invitation to this workspace.
members.roleHelp: Admins can manage content and the team.
members.removeModalDescription: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from the workspace?

apiKeys.description: Keys give a headless client access to the public API for published content.
apiKeys.emptyDescription: Create your first key to expose content through the public API. We'll show the full key only once.
apiKeys.revokeModalDescription: The key “{name}” will stop working immediately. This action cannot be undone.
apiKeys.scopePostsReadHint: Read access to published content via the public API.
apiKeys.nameRequired: Enter a name for the key
apiKeys.createdDescription: Save this key somewhere safe — you'll only see it now.
apiKeys.createDescription: The key grants access to the public content API for this workspace.
apiKeys.nameHelp: To recognize the key, e.g. “Production site”.
apiKeys.scopesHelp: Optional. Restrict what the key can access.

webhooks.description: Notify external systems about publications — we send signed POST events to your address.
webhooks.emptyDescription: Add your first webhook to receive publication events. We'll show the signing secret only once.
webhooks.removeModalDescription: We'll stop sending events to {url}. This action cannot be undone.
webhooks.eventPublishedHint: Sent when a post is published.
webhooks.eventUnpublishedHint: Sent when a post's publication is reverted.
webhooks.createdDescription: Save the signing secret — you'll only see it now.
webhooks.createDescription: We'll send POST events to this address, signed with an HMAC secret.
webhooks.urlHelp: The endpoint that will receive events.
webhooks.deliveriesEmptyDescription: Events will appear here once the webhook starts receiving publications.

channels.description: Connect social accounts to publish content automatically when you save a post.
channels.publicHostDescription: We use this to build full links in content published to social channels.
channels.disconnectModalDescription: We'll stop publishing content to the “{name}” account. You can reconnect it anytime.
channels.callbackHint: You'll be back at the channel list in a moment.

billing.description: Manage your subscription plan, AI limits, and billing details.
billing.adminOnly: Only an administrator can change the plan.
billing.trialReassurance: Card required · cancel anytime · we'll remind you before charging
billing.checkoutSuccess: Payment received — your plan is updated.

new.title: Create a workspace
new.description: A workspace is your working space. You'll become its administrator.

common.secretRevealTitle: Copy it now — we won't show it again.
common.secretRevealBody: This value is visible only once, right after creation. Store it securely.

trial.bannerTitle: Your Pro trial ends in {days} days
trial.bannerBody: After that your card will be charged. Keep autonomous content, images and multi-language.
